school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Yearbook goes with at least two of Boyd, 86%, and Period 1.
Choir goes with exactly two of Boyd, 86%, and Period 6.
Either Period 4 goes with 80% or 84% goes with Scouts.
Boyd, Frost, and Hale go with 78%, 82%, and Period 3, in some order.
Either Period 6 goes with Boyd or Carver goes with 76%.
Between Period 4 and Period 6, one goes with Carver and the other with 86%.
The class with 76%'s period is higher than both Hale's period and the member of the Yearbook club's period.
Exactly two of these are true: Boyd goes with Period 1; Carver goes with Period 4; Hale goes with 84%.
At least one of Boyd goes with 86%, Drama does not go with Frost, or Dunn does not go with Scouts if and only if 76% goes with Scouts.
If Drama goes with Frost, then Frost goes with 80%.
The member of the Robotics club's grade is at most 7% away from Nash's grade.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
